demoScenario.goal: Run a fast investor walkthrough of upload → parse → detect → suggest risers → manual move → export.
demoScenario.whyThisScope: Keeps the run deterministic and visually explainable while still showing multi-floor riser behavior.

riserAndShaftCandidates.selectionRule: Use existing BIMPipe stack labels from the ADAM_10 baseline export and preserve labels during manual adjustment.
manualReviewChecklist: Verify each stack appears in plan view on included floors.
Confirm stacks are near toilet/kitchen wet-core clusters before export.
If a stack is adjusted manually, keep the same stack label and track the reason in demo notes.

priority: Toilet fixtures (primary connection targets for sanitary routing demo).
Kitchen/service sinks where kitchens were detected in selected demo floors.
validation: Each detected toilet on included floors is assigned to one visible stack candidate.
Any unassigned target is called out before export as a live demo caveat.

steps: Upload ADAM_10.ifc and confirm demo-mode file gate accepts only this model.
Show parsed floors and explain reduced floor scope for live reliability.
Run fixture detection and highlight toilet + kitchen candidates.
Generate risers (R1..R7), then manually reposition one stack to demonstrate override precedence.
Export IFC and explain that output is prepared from the validated in-session riser set.
